title: ACER Aspire 14 AI OLED 14" Laptop, Copilot+ PC - Intel® Core™ Ultra 5, 512 GB SSD, Silver
overview:
Browsing the web, working on a Word doc, or checking your emails? Whatever you're up to, the Acer Aspire 14 is powered by an Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor, so it's ready to run your all your tasks. It's powerful, efficient and uses Intel® AI Boost for an extra kick in AI apps, like Microsoft Copilot. The Full HD OLED display's got vivid colour and wide viewing angles, so everyone can get a good view of the screen. It only weighs 1.4 kg, so you can take it anywhere.

Good to know

- A Copilot+ PC brings the latest AI features so you can work and create faster than ever before
- The Full HD webcam supports Windows Hello, so you can log in with just a smile
- With Thunderbolt 4 and HDMI 2.1, you can hook up speedy SSDs and 4K monitor
- Quickly load up your apps and photos with the 512 GB SSD storage
- 16 GB of RAM will make it easy to run multiple apps, documents and browser tabs
- Browse, stream and download faster than ever before, thanks to WiFi 6E
- With up to 16 hours of battery life, you can leave the charging brick at home

Why we love it

title: ACER Aspire Go 15 15.6" Laptop - Intel® Core™ i5, 256 GB SSD, Silver
overview:
Browsing the web, working on a Word doc or just checking your emails? The Acer Aspire Go is powered by an octa-core Intel® Core™ i5 processor, so it's ready for your everyday computing. It supports WiFi 6 for a super-fast and reliable wireless connection. And you don't even need to worry about finding a socket. With up to 9.5 hours of battery life, you have loads of time to get everything done.

Good to know

- The Full HD display has plenty of detail and contrast, so you can enjoy your shows and movies
- Get the power of AI with the touch of a button thanks to Microsoft Copilot key 
- You can hook up accessories and high-res monitors – there's HDMI 2.1, USB Type-C and USB
- With 256 GB SSD storage, you'll have super-fast loading times and plenty of space for your files

title: ACER Aspire 16 AI 16" Laptop, Copilot+ PC - Snapdragon X, 1 TB SSD, Grey
overview:
Browsing the web, working on a Word doc, or checking your emails? Whatever you're up to, the Acer Aspire 16 is powered by a Snapdragon X processor, so it's ready to run your all your tasks. It's incredibly powerful, efficient and uses Hexagon AI NPU for an extra kick in AI apps, like Microsoft Copilot. The Full HD+ IPS display's got vivid colour and wide viewing angles, so everyone can get a good view of the screen. It only weighs 1.55 kg, so you can take it anywhere.

Good to know

- A Copilot+ PC brings the latest AI features so you can work and create faster than ever before
- The screen's got a 120 Hz refresh rate for perfectly smooth motion
- The Full HD webcam supports Windows Hello, so you can log in with just a smile
- With USB 4 and HDMI 2.1, you can hook up speedy SSDs and 4K monitor
- Quickly load up your apps and photos with the 1 TB SSD storage
- 16 GB of RAM will make it easy to run multiple apps, documents and browser tabs
- Browse, stream and download faster than ever before, thanks to WiFi 6E
- With up to 28 hours of battery life, you can leave the charging brick at home

title: ACER Swift Edge AI 14" Laptop, Copilot+ PC - Intel® Core™ Ultra 7, 1 TB SSD, White
overview:
The Swift Edge AI's got sharp looks and brains. It weighs less than 1 kg and it's under 1 cm thick, so you'll barely feel it in your bag. Running the show is the Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor. It's incredibly powerful, efficient and uses Intel® AI Boost for an extra kick in AI apps, like Microsoft Copilot. And when it's time to take a break and watch a movie, you're in for a treat. The 2.8K OLED display is full of contrast, colour and detail. It makes even spreadsheets look good. And with battery life up to 15 hours, you don't need to waste space in your bag on a charger.

Good to know

- A Copilot+ PC brings the latest AI features so you can work and create faster than ever before
- With 32 GB of DDR5 RAM you can multitask like you've never multitasked before
- The Full HD webcam will make you look great on work calls and catchups with friends
- No more typing out passwords – Windows Hello facial recognition is more secure and convenient
- Browse, stream and download faster than ever before thanks to WiFi 7
- You can hook up monitors, transfer data or charge the laptop using the Thunderbolt 4 ports
